lines.en: Good morning. Please have a seat.
Thank you for having me today.
lines.zh: 感谢您今天让我来面试。

lines.en: So, tell me a little about yourself.
lines.zh: 那么，请简单介绍一下你自己。

lines.en: I graduated last year and have been working as a marketing assistant.
lines.zh: 我去年毕业，一直担任市场助理。

lines.en: Why do you want to leave your current job?
lines.zh: 你为什么想离开现在的工作？

lines.en: I am looking for more challenges and opportunities to grow.
lines.zh: 我想寻找更多挑战和成长机会。

lines.en: I am good at teamwork and always meet deadlines.
lines.zh: 我擅长团队合作，而且总能按时完成任务。

lines.en: Do you have any questions for us?
lines.zh: 你有什么问题想问我们吗？

lines.en: Yes, what does a typical day look like in this role?
lines.zh: 有的，这个岗位的日常工作是怎样的？
